title: SystemSwap
body:
SystemSwap is a re-creation of the discord bot [PluralKit's](https://pluralkit.me/) chat proxying designed for a bukkit-based server environment.

This software is in alpha, it may not work as intended, may have performance issues, and may cause unforseen issues with other plugins. Report any issues on the [github tracker](https://github.com/Kurumi78/SystemSwap/issues).

Installing SystemSwap is as simple as installing both it AND a nickname plugin such as [Essentials](https://essentialsx.net/) or [Carbon](https://modrinth.com/plugin/carbon). If you are using one besides Essentials make sure to go into the config and set the NickCommand value properly for your plugin. 

SystemSwap has two commands.

```
/system (create/delete)

/alters (create/delete/set) (name) <setting*> <value*>

*Only needed if using set command
```

SystemSwap uses an SQLite file named SystemSwap.db located in its config folder for storing data.

You may contact me on discord at "kurumitokisaki" or in my [support discord](https://discord.com/invite/euUyuZhgap).

Planned Features.
1. Ability to use MySQL databases. (Allows cross server data syncing.)
2. Admin commands
3. Its own system for setting nicknames so it does not rely on other plugins.
4. Custom Skins for each Alter.
5. Permissions for every command/feature.
6. More?* (Suggest things in github or in my discord.)


The plugin has been uploaded/released in an Alpha state to help find bugs, and to get feedback as it gets finished.
